Member.title: Member
Member.description: A person who needs to be tracked for attendance.

name.description: The full name of the member.

department.description: The department or group the member belongs to.

AttendanceRecord.title: Attendance Record
AttendanceRecord.description: A record of a member's attendance on a specific day.

memberName.description: The name of the member at the time of check-in.

date.description: The date of the check-in in YYYY-MM-DD format.

timestamp.description: The exact time of the check-in.

/members/{memberId}.description: Stores the list of members to be tracked.
